ham.subject: Weekly Marketing Update – This Week’s Highlights
ham.body:
Hi Team,

Here is your weekly marketing newsletter with the latest campaign performance, upcoming events, and a few quick tips for the next quarter.

Campaign Highlights:
- Social Media Launch: 25% increase in engagement.
- Email Campaign: 18% open rate, 4% click-through.
- Upcoming Webinar: 150 registrations.

Quick Tips:
- Use dynamic content to boost click rates.
- Segment your lists for personalized messages.
- Test subject lines A/B testing.

Thank you for your hard work. Let’s keep the momentum going!

Best regards,
Marketing Team

spam.subject: URGENT: Immediate Action Required – CEO Gift Card Request
spam.body:
Dear [Name],

I hope you are doing well. I am writing to urgently request the purchase of a $250 gift card for the upcoming executive retreat scheduled for next Friday. This is a critical expense that needs to be processed at your earliest convenience.

Please use the following secure link to complete the transaction: <URL>

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,
John Doe
Chief Executive Officer
